sections.heading: Required Access
sections.body:
To add your IP address to an IP access list, you must have
[Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to the project.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body:
You added your IP address to the IP access list when you created your
first cluster.

To add other IP access list entries, see [IP Access List](access-list).

To learn more about the security features available, see
[Configure Security Features for Clusters](setup-cluster-security).

sections.heading: Next Steps
sections.body:
Now that you added your connection IP address to the IP access list,
proceed to [connection string is valid](atlas-connect-to-deployment).
